message:
feat(web): Enhance 3D molecular visualization with better lighting and colors

Model3DView improvements:
- Three-point lighting setup (key/fill/rim) for depth perception
- Proper zoom-to-extents using FOV calculation
- Extended far clipping plane for large structures
- Better initial camera angle

Structure loader visual upgrades:
- High-contrast element colors for dark backgrounds
- Carbon atoms now bright blue (was invisible dark gray)
- Brighter bond materials with specular highlights
- Increased sphere/cylinder polygon counts for smoothness
- Vibrant chain colors for ribbon/tube rendering
- Surface mode with inner core for depth perception
- Added element colors for CA, ZN, CL, NA

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
